---
name: New agent or skill
about: Propose adding a new agent or skill to shared/
labels: new-agent, new-skill
---

## Type

- [ ] New agent (`shared/agents/`)
- [ ] New skill (`shared/skills/`)

## Name

What would you call it? (kebab-case, e.g. `load-tester`, `schema-validator`)

## Role / purpose

One or two sentences: what does this agent or skill do, and when should it be invoked?

## Why it belongs in `shared/`

Explain why this is generic enough to be useful across different projects, not just your own.

## Proposed prompt / instructions (optional)

If you have a draft, paste it here. Don't worry about polish — a rough outline is fine.

## Examples of when it would be used

Describe one or two concrete scenarios where you'd invoke this agent or skill.
